name: Nyx
title: The Stray
mechanicsDetail: Duelist Mechanics: Stall, Rush, Debuffs, Crit, Shards.

startingAbility.name: Ferality
startingAbility.rawText: For Rush (5), gain 5 (+25% Attack Speed) Attack Speed and 5 (+25% Attack) Attack for each time this ability has triggered this combat. Every 12 auto attacks, refresh all of Nyx's Rush abilities.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Keen-Eyed
rankBSpecializations.rawText: Assassins and Duelists instantly kill any enemies they damage below 20 (+5 per rank)% Max HP. Backup.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Wild
rankBSpecializations.rawText: Perform a 5-hit combo. Each hit counts as an auto attack that deals 100 (+33% Attack Speed, +25% Magic, +25% Attack)% damage. If the enemy dies during the combo, Nyx jumps to the nearest enemy and re-casts this ability.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Spark
rankBSpecializations.rawText: After Stall (10), each auto attack inflicts 2 (+1 per 30 Attack Speed) Burn. After Stall (20), each auto attack inflicts 1 (+1 per 40 Attack Speed) Frost. After Stall (30), each auto attack inflicts 1 per 50 Attack Speed Poison.

quote: Yeah. I know I'm small. Get over it.

lore.guild: The Hunt - “When the call comes, we hunt.” Bringing the hood to the Rifts. Rushing and stalling, whatever you need.
lore.currentWork: Nyx slipped past three rift lockdowns before The Hunt gave up chasing the kid and signed them instead. Now the youngest breaker on any roster: too quick to catch, too vicious to ignore. Nyx has no family on file, no address, no home. They don't trust The Hunt enough to sleep at their guild house. But every time there's a fight, the kid is always already there.
lore.motivation: Nyx doesn't follow guilds but people worth trusting - and hasn't found one yet. Be the first, and the kid stops being a stray.
